reason_for_decision: The article now explains range as a conditional performance statement tied to target, environment, geometry, and workflow, which is enough for PASS.
strengths: It now explains probability, false alarms, and geometry alongside the headline number.
The distinction between detection and tracking remains clear.
The workflow section improves operational interpretation of range claims.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is materially better grounded and more useful for interpreting radar range claims.
